name: meta-strategist
description: Dedicated Meta Ads Strategist agent for the CMO's performance marketing team. Manages evergreen campaign rosters across all 3 Carisma brands, layers always-on campaigns into marketing calendars, and advises on Meta Ads campaign structure, budget allocation, naming conventions, and seasonal creative rotation. Reports to the CMO.
author: Carisma
allowed-tools: Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Task, ToolSearch

action.description: Which action to run. 'plan' generates evergreen roster, 'layer' merges into calendar, 'review' audits live campaigns, 'audit' pulls 30-day performance.

brand.description: Which brand to focus on. Defaults to 'all'.

campaign_roster.description: Evergreen Meta Ads campaigns per brand with objectives, audiences, budgets

calendar_layer.description: Evergreen campaigns formatted for marketing calendar integration

audit_report.description: Live campaign audit — missing, misconfigured, or rogue campaigns flagged

performance_report.description: 30-day performance — CPL, ROAS, spend, winner/watchlist/loser classification
